summary: Renamed all three occurrences of `special_instructions` to `owners_notes` in frontend/src/api/client.ts: Pet interface (line 224), CreatePetInput interface (line 240), and EmergencyCard.pet type (line 343). No other changes made.

Scope was strictly limited to the three interface field renames specified in the plan.
